action.reasoning: Observation: Starting from scratch with empty workspace. Need to build audio deepfake detector for ASVspoof 2021 LA task. Analysis: Given pretrained speech encoders available, XLS-R-300M is a strong baseline for generalization. Must handle imbalanced classes (~10% bonafide). Decision: Set up complete pipeline (model, training, prediction) with attentive pooling + linear head. Start with frozen encoder, few epochs (2) to get fast baseline and measure iteration time. Submit eval to validate pipeline.
